attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
ITEM_KEY,
MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DTM,
END_TV_DTM,
DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
AUDIT_FLG,
GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
DASHBOARD_FLG,
REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
WORKBENCH_FLG,
SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
 GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
GTC_ITEM_DESCR	
FROM	    $$WORKDB.W_ITEM_CUSTOMS  WRK  
WHERE	DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1    FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS_TV   TV
WHERE WRK.ITEM_KEY = TV.ITEM_KEY
        AND WRK.START_TV_DTM = TV.START_TV_DTM)

SELECT ITEM_KEY,
MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
AUDIT_FLG,
GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
DASHBOARD_FLG,
REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
WORKBENCH_FLG,
SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
GTC_ITEM_DESCR	
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS_TV TV    
WHERE  END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
